info.name: Ravy Complete API
info.description: Complete collection for all frontend API endpoints including Auth, Categories, Products, Orders, and Payments.

request.description: Creates a customer account and returns token + user (201).
Authenticates user and returns token + user data.
Logs out user and revokes token.
Returns user profile information.
Updates user profile information.
Verifies user email with OTP code.
Resends email verification code.
Sends password reset email.
Resets user password.
Authenticates user via social provider.
Returns main categories only (parent_id=0) for homepage collections.
Returns list of all categories with products count.
Returns single category details with products.
Returns breadcrumb navigation for category.
Returns products with filters. Available filters: is_new=1, is_featured=1, sort=latest|price_asc|price_desc|best_seller|trending, search=keyword, category=slug, brand=slug
Returns single product details with variants, images, and related products.
Increments product view count.
Adds product to wishlist or removes it if already added.
Returns user's wishlist products.
Returns list of all brands.
Returns single brand details with products.
Returns guest cart with items and totals (no auth required).
Returns authenticated user's cart with items and totals.
Adds product to guest cart (no auth required).
Adds product to authenticated user's cart.
Updates quantity of a cart item.
Removes item from cart.
Removes all items from cart.
Returns cart totals and available packaging options.
Creates order with Cash on Delivery payment method.
Creates order with Paymob payment method and initiates payment.
Returns user's orders.
Returns single order details.
Returns available payment methods.
Initiates payment for an existing order.
Returns payment transaction status.
Validates a promo code and returns discount details.
Returns promo code details without validation.
Paymob payment status notification endpoint.
